summary: Racing game inspired by Mario Kart with at least 10 playable characters and Mario-style mechanics
architectural_notes: Kart racing mechanics inspired by Mario Kart
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Colorful cartoon-style racing track background with checkered flags and banners (track-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Character selection grid showing 10 unique kart racer portraits in vibrant cartoon style (character-portraits.dim_1200x800.png)
- Power-up item icons including speed boost, shield, and projectile in bright colors (powerup-icons.dim_512x512.png)
- Racing game logo with bold playful lettering and kart silhouette (game-logo.dim_800x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a 3D kart racing game using Three.js with React Three Fiber featuring a track environment with proper collision detection and physics
Implement at least 10 distinct playable characters, each with a unique kart design and visual appearance that players can select before racing
Implement Mario Kart-style racing mechanics including acceleration, braking, drifting/power sliding, and item-based power-ups that affect gameplay
Create a race state management system that tracks player position, lap count, race time, and handles race start/finish conditions

Design a vibrant, colorful racing game aesthetic with a playful cartoon style reminiscent of classic kart racers, using bright colors, smooth animations, and energetic UI elements throughout the entire application

new_feature_requests.summary: Create racing game with Mario Kart-style gameplay
Store race completion records in the backend including character used, completion time, and track name to maintain leaderboards
